title: View Permissions should be a standard feature across all plans
excerpt:

posts.author: kitcutty (Tyler Swanson)
posts.cookedHtml:
I wanted to share some feedback regarding the view permissions feature. It’s disappointing to see what many would consider a standard functionality limited exclusively to the enterprise plan.

This feature plays a fundamental role in managing data access and should be available across all tiers, especially for teams trying to maintain organization and security. Requiring an upgrade to enterprise—at a cost of $6,000 more annually for just 15 users—feels less like added value and more like a paywall for basic functionality.

I understand the need to differentiate plans, but I’d encourage your team to revisit how features like this are positioned. Enhancing core usability for all plans could go a long way in building trust and long-term loyalty from users like myself.

Thank you for considering this feedback.
